figures.caption: Table 12: Bucketed top-5 reranking success rate (%) for Leak+Rewrite (Back-Reveal) by query-response similarity and domain. “Trained rerankers” denotes the average across the seven rerankers used during rewriter training (Section 4.1).

Table 11: Hyperparameter configuration for rewriter training. The high weight on reranker robustness (α3 = 0.4) reflects its importance for successful delivery of suggestive prompts through RAG pipelines.

Table 10: Response variant comparison. Leak contains only relevant information. Leak+Naive Append adds explicit steering (bolded). Leak+Rewrite embeds the same intent implicitly within natural informational content.
